projects.name: Prisma-Calendar
projects.description: The Ultimate Temporal Visualization Engine for Obsidian.  Prisma Calendar is a schema-agnostic visualization layer that turns any Obsidian note with a date into a first-class citizen on your timeline. No rigid schemas, no predefined fields — just your data, your rules, your filters, rendered exactly how you need it.
